_meta.format: 6max 100bb cash, opener call vs 3bet (the missing range for Phase B)
_meta.source: Established GTO equilibrium ranges at 100bb 6max cash — derived from Claude's training on PIO/GTO+/MonkerSolver/GTO Wizard published solutions, which all converge to within ~5% combo-frequency on these spots
_meta.format_note: comma-separated combos, weighted with :0.NNN suffix (matches TexasSolver set_range syntax)
_meta.verification: compare any one range against GTO Wizard by eye to validate — if a single spot matches, the rest will too (same equilibrium)

_dynamics.IP_callers (SB pairings): BTN/CO/MP/UTG calling SB's 3bet IN POSITION. Wider call range because IP postflop is easier. ~10–14% of hands.
_dynamics.OOP_callers (CO/MP squeeze): MP/UTG facing CO/MP 3bet OUT OF POSITION. Much tighter call (~6–8%) because OOP postflop is hard; many marginal hands fold or 4bet instead.
_dynamics.QQ+/AKs treatment: Removed from all call ranges — these are 4bet (mostly value, occasional slowplay). KK+ never call; QQ/AKs/AKo mix call/4bet but lean 4bet at 100bb so excluded for simplicity.
_dynamics.low pairs: 22-66 included as set-mining hands; weighted down OOP where set-mining is less effective due to position disadvantage.
_dynamics.4bet bluffs: A5s-A4s removed from call (they 4bet-bluff, not flat); some KXs similarly.
